name: chart-tooltip-indicator-none
visual_summary: The chart-tooltip-indicator-none component is a block element that displays a chart or graph. It is a part of a larger charting system and provides a clear visual representation of data. Developers use this component in data-driven dashboards and applications to display complex information in an easily digestible format.
